class.name: ASDelivery
class.brief_description: Reactive effect delivery node for projectiles and payloads.
class.description: [ASDelivery] is a specialized node designed to carry and deliver [ASPackage]s to [ASComponent] targets. Unlike [ASComponent], which acts as a full ability system hub for an actor, [ASDelivery] is a lightweight utility that can be attached to any node (like a projectile's Area2D) to inject effects upon impact.

method.name: activate
method.description: Activates the delivery. If [param duration] is positive, it overrides [member life_span].

method.name: can_deliver_to
method.description: Checks if the delivery can reach the specified target (checks groups and validity).

method.name: deliver
method.description: Delivers the payload of an [ASPackage] to the target component. Automatically dispatches ASEventTags defined in the package upon successful delivery.

method.name: is_delivery_valid
method.description: Returns true if the delivery is active and hasn't expired.

members.member: If true, attempts to connect automatically to [Area2D] or [Area3D] signals in the parent node.
The magnitude or strength level of the delivery. This gets injected into all effects spawned by the delivery.
Maximum duration the delivery stays active (0 = infinite).
If true, the delivery deactivates automatically after the first successful delivery.
The [ASPackage] payload containing effects and cues.
The [ASComponent] that initiated this delivery (e.g., the original attacker).
List of groups that targets must belong to for delivery to occur.

signal.name: delivered
signal.description: Emitted when a package is successfully delivered to a target.

signal.name: expired
signal.description: Emitted when the life_span timer reaches zero.
